Book a Free Consultation View Services
About Muse

Not your basic bookkeeper.

I've been living in the world of numbers and businesses for over 20 years - and I mean that literally. At 17, I was already working for a small IT company, building computers, setting up networks, and learning QuickBooks Desktop before I knew what a balance sheet was. That dual fluency in technology and finance has followed me ever since.

Over the next two decades I worked my way through office management, accounting, and bookkeeping across multiple industries - including years inside a CPA firm where I watched small business owners not receive the dedication and attention they deserved, yet were still billed for it.

That's why I started Muse Bookkeeping in January 2020. Not because bookkeeping needed another service provider - but because small business owners deserved better. Clear communication, clean books delivered on time, and a bookkeeper who maintains consistent communication and actually explains what the numbers mean.

Over the years I've had the pleasure of working with consultants, coaches, small marketing agencies, a video game developer, manufacturing companies, and an aircraft MRO.

I fully understand the inner workings of service-based businesses - from their usual tech stack, chart of accounts, and communication styles. I also still have my soft spot for IT/MSPs - I understand your RMM and why you have RMR, your contractor payments, and your tool stack. You won't spend twenty minutes explaining how your business works.

And please tell me you're not still billing by the hour and wasting hours on invoicing!

  • 20+ years in accounting, bookkeeping & office management
  • 6+ years running Muse Bookkeeping
  • Certified QuickBooks Online ProAdvisor
  • Certified Intuit Bookkeeping Trained
  • Gusto Payroll Partner
  • 100% remote · Serving clients nationwide

What We Do

Financial clarity, handled.

Every service is fully remote, fixed-fee, and designed around the way real small businesses actually operate. No hourly surprises. No mystery invoices. Just clean, accurate books - delivered.

Monthly Bookkeeping

Fully managed monthly bookkeeping - categorized transactions, reconciled accounts, and clean financial reports delivered every month. Tax-ready, always.

Recurring · Monthly

Payroll Services

Full-service payroll processing via Gusto - employee onboarding, direct deposit, payroll tax filings, and year-end W-2s. Payday becomes effortless.

Weekly · Bi-weekly · Monthly

Catch-up & Cleanup

Behind on your books? Months of unreconciled chaos? We've seen worse. Catch-up bookkeeping gets you current fast - no judgment, just results.

One-time · Project-based

Fractional CFO Advisory

A Fractional CFO gives you executive-level financial strategy without the executive-level salary. Instead of a full-time CFO at $150k+/year, you get cash flow forecasting, profitability analysis, budget planning, and growth strategy - on a flexible, part-time basis. The difference between knowing your numbers and actually using them.

Strategic · Advisory
Transparent Pricing

Fixed fees. No surprises.

Pricing is based on monthly transaction volume, number of accounts, and service complexity. All plans are billed monthly. Payroll available as an add-on to any tier.

CPA Partner Services

Audit & compilation, referred right.

Need CPA-credentialed financial statements? We partner with a full-service CPA firm to get you exactly what lenders, investors, and regulators require. No runaround.

These services are provided by our CPA partner. Muse Bookkeeping coordinates the referral and ensures your books are audit-ready before engagement begins, saving you time and money.

Level 1 · No Assurance

Compiled Financial Statements

Formatted, GAAP-compliant, CPA-letterhead.
Starting at:
$800
flat fee · 1 to 3 week turnaround
What's Included
  • Income statement, balance sheet & cash flow
  • Prepared per GAAP/IFRS standards
  • Issued on CPA firm letterhead
  • Internal management use & basic lender requirements
  • Business credit lines & lease agreements
Best for: Small businesses needing formatted statements for management or low-risk stakeholders.
Request a Referral
Most Requested
Level 2 · Limited Assurance

Reviewed Financial Statements

The lender & investor standard.
Starting at:
$2,200
flat fee · 1 to 4 week turnaround
Everything in Compiled, plus
  • CPA analytical review & inquiry of management
  • Year-over-year variance analysis
  • Limited assurance opinion issued
  • SBA loans & bank financing requirements
  • Investor due diligence & funding rounds
  • Government programs & capital lease financing
Best for: Businesses securing bank financing, SBA loans, or presenting to investors.
Request a Referral
Level 3 · Highest Assurance

Full Audit

Maximum credibility for any stakeholder.
Starting at:
$4,900
custom quote · 3 to 8 week turnaround
Everything in Review, plus
  • Full corroboration & transaction testing
  • Internal controls evaluation
  • Third-party balance confirmations
  • Unqualified audit opinion issued
  • Acquisitions, mergers & business sales
  • Nonprofits, regulators & government contractors
Best for: Businesses going through a sale, acquisition, or with regulatory/compliance requirements.
Request a Referral

Why our clients pay less

The market rate for these services runs 30 to 50% higher when books are unprepped. CPAs bill by the hour and messy records cost you. Because your books are already clean, reconciled, and audit-ready when you arrive, the CPA spends zero time on cleanup and gets straight to work. These prices reflect that advantage.

Let's Get You Ready

Pricing is market-rate based on complexity and business size. · Provided by our CPA partner. · Final quote issued after consultation.

FAQ

Questions we hear all the time.

If you have a question that is not here, just reach out. There are no dumb questions when it comes to your finances.

Not at all. Muse Bookkeeping is 100% remote and serves clients nationwide. Everything is handled through cloud-based tools including QuickBooks Online, Gusto, and secure file sharing. Most clients never need an in-person meeting.

Yes, and this is actually where we do some of our best work. Catch-up and cleanup bookkeeping is a core service. We have untangled books that were years behind, mixed personal and business accounts, and everything in between. We will assess the situation, quote the cleanup as a flat-fee project, and then move you into a clean monthly rhythm.

Yes. Our deepest specialization is IT companies and managed service providers. We understand MRR, recurring revenue structures, the SIL chart of accounts, PSA and RMM tool integrations, and the financial benchmarks that matter in that industry. We work with other service businesses too, but MSPs are our home base.

QuickBooks Online for bookkeeping, Gusto for payroll, and whatever tools connect to them cleanly. We are a certified QuickBooks Online ProAdvisor with 20 years of experience on the platform. If you are on a different accounting system, reach out and we can talk through whether a migration makes sense.

No, we are not a CPA firm — but we have a CPA partner that handles all things taxes & audit. If you already have a CPA, EA, or other tax preparer, we are happy to coordinate with them to handle your taxes. Either way, your books will be clean, organized, and handed off exactly the way any tax professional needs them.

Monthly bookkeeping is flat-rate and based on your revenue tier and transaction volume. Payroll is priced per run. Cleanup projects are quoted flat fee before we start, so there are no surprise bills. We do not require long-term contracts. You can cancel anytime with 30 days notice.

We start with a free consultation to understand your business and current books. Once you are ready to proceed, we get read access to your existing accounts, review the current state, and map out the cleanup or setup needed. From there we establish your chart of accounts, connect your bank feeds, and get your first month reconciled. Most clients are fully set up within two to three weeks.

Reconciled books, a profit and loss statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement delivered by the 15th of every month. Higher-tier plans include additional reporting and more frequent touchpoints. You will always know where your business stands without having to ask.

Still have questions?

Ask Us Anything
Client Feedback

What clients actually say.

Megan has completed the regular tasks of reconciling credit card statements, putting together monthly P&L statements, compiling receipts, handling payroll, and coordinating sales tax payments. She has been the bookkeeper of two of my businesses for the past two years, and we have together managed to have no tax issues with the IRS or formal employee complaints to the Texas Workforce Commission. Megan has been able to navigate the ups and downs of a small business environment, which is always no simple task. She is diligent, treats me fairly, and has a broad range of skills related to bookkeeping. I recommend hiring Megan if you need a nimble and honest bookkeeper.

Andrew M.

Consultant · 2-Year Client
